Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.family

Class Pet

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.AbstractEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.family.Pet
public class Pet
extends AbstractEntity
This class represents pet.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník

    Pet​(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String type)
